reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029

review_content.Placements: After the final year, the paid internship is provided for one year. After that, placements are all dependent on where you work. In case you become an MO, your salary will be around 1 Lakh rupees. If you clear NEET PG and get junior residency in any college, your salary will be around 80k rupees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The one thing I'm pretty obsessed about is the new and giant infrastructure of our college. We have several buildings, all so huge and magnificent. Our college stands as a beacon of modern architecture. We have a lake right beside our college. We have lifts in each building.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This will make us a doctor But Facing faculty issue .

review_content.Placements: There is only less than 2% chances of getting failed almost students get passed after entering any medical college so there is no such issue about getting failed Package is all according to government on the basis of degree and experience Government will assign the hospital You can also do a job in private hospital and also can open a own clinic Our main roles is to provide better treatment to the patient .
review_content.Infrastructure: There is only bad thing is that there is less number of faculty as per needed there is no faculty for lab activity there no faculty for pharma they not have even single hod in our college Wi-Fi is available only in academic block only for faculty members not for students Government provide sockets in every room in hostel for netwrok but they are not working Quality of facilities is best there is large rooms good ventilation Mess food not so good As we in medical college so there is no issue about medical facilities For sports there is not a single ground for any sports All are in under construction .

May 20, 2020: Applications for Arunodaya University admissions 2020 are now open on the official website.

Arunodaya University was established in 2014 under the Arunachal Pradesh Act No-13 of the Arunachal Pradesh State Government. Located in Itanagar, Arunachal Pradesh, it is accredited by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and Directorate of Higher & Technical Education, Itanagar.

This University offers a vast range of degree, diplomas, and certificates courses at UG, PG, doctoral and diploma-level. Affiliated to Government of Arunachal Pradesh, it has also gained accreditations from the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and Bar Council of India (BCI) for some of its courses offered.

Arunodaya University admission 2020 process is conducted in online as well as offline modes. Students can either visit official website i.e. www.arunodayauniversity.ac.in or can submit the admission form at the University campus. Admission to all the courses offered by Arunodaya University is granted basis candidate’s score in previous qualifying exam or performance in entrance test and personal interview conducted by the University.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

individual_reviews.title: Review by me of GNG college.

content.Placements: Placement in this college is not up to the mark yes 3-4 companies would come but the placement rate is not good in this college. You can choose another college better than this. Some of students were placed in reputed organizations also but placement rate should be more than 70% .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average; they provide you labs, a library, and all the required things are available here. There are different fests of dancing, singing, etc. in which students can participate. Also, intercollege competitions were also held only for girls.

individual_reviews.title: Average college not recommended.

content.Placements: I am a Bachelors of arts student. In my course there are almost 300 students in B.A. general I think there is only 2 to 5 companies for recruiter. Very less students got internship from our college. Our college doesn’t offer many courses like psycho honours.
content.Infrastructure: Most of the things are broken. There is no renovation. College doesn’t allow students to use elevator even when needed. Overall not good infrastructure from inside, old benches, small campus. Fans don't work, small auditorium, broken titles, nasty washrooms.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good to take admission.

content.Placements: Students who got 50% in 12th get admission here, which is good because any student can get admission here. Our college provides all kinds of courses like fashion designing and human development. It is a girls' college. Students get internships. The top companies come here and conduct interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good facilities and infrastructure. All the staff are very cooperative. All facilities are provided, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a well-maintained library. The quality of hostel facilities is good. The food is also very good. Medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.title: Guru Nanak Girls College, Santpura is a good college for girls.

content.Placements: During our course duration, there was a system available regarding the placement but it was not much good, as I know rarely some of the companies come here to hire students and they inform the students for it from time to time.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good to say mostly it has all the facilities. There was a good canteen which serves us a good quality of food at valuable charges. A hostel and a mess were available for students. It also has some other facilities like a park, library, etc.

individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for girls.

content.Placements: There were 400 students in 4 sections. No companies came here to recruit students in our course. There were no salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. There were 3 big hostels for girls. The quality of the hostels is good. All girls have their own beds and almirahs. The canteen was good. They served fresh food. They conducted sports camps for students.
content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful and cooperative. All teachers had Ph.D. s in their fields. They taught us well. They also provided current knowledge for students. The semester exams were good. The pass percentage of students in our course was 88%. Students could choose subjects based on their interests.

reviews_list.review_title: College was very good to study .

review_content.Placements: 90% of students were placed in this course. The highest package is 1 lakh per month, the lowest is 20k per month and the average is 50k per month. review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, the infrastructure was really good. Classrooms are maintained very well, and the clean and neat benches are also very good. In the library, some types of books are not available, which makes it a little difficult for students but the online library is available.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of the students from our course were placed. review_content.Infrastructure: The college has well-equipped computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi. Classrooms were highly moderate with projectors, and smart classrooms and labs are extremely good with lots of instruments and chemicals. Our college encourages sports and games. There is a library with many books written by different authors.

review_summary.college_name: M.V. College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Take admission in this college for a good experience.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 2LPA and the lowest is 1.1 LPA. Average package is 1.4 LPA. Not many companies come to recruit in our college. About 15-20% students get internship. Top roles offered in my course are Consulting Physicist, Research Associate and Junior Physicist.
content.Infrastructure: One of the best facilities and infrastructure are available in my college. Our classrooms and library are very big and beautiful. Many students use labs and Wi-Fi is also available in my college for teachers and staff members. Good quality of facilities are present in my college. There is no canteen and mess available in my college for food. Other facilities such as sports and games are very good in my college.

individual_reviews.title: This is a degree college and it does not have a hostel and other facilities.

content.Placements: There were no students placed on this course. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 0.9 LPA. There was no company recruitment at this college. Students did not get internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college didn't provide Wi-Fi or labs. One of the best things about our college was that there were large classrooms. The library was average. Overall, the facilities provided were average. Our college had no mess or canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: M.V. College is a good college.

content.Placements: About 90% of the students pass out each year because this college attitude of study is on the next level. The highest salary offered was Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month. Phillips company visited our college for placements. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Around 20% of the student get the job here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility was available here for better study, but at our time it was not available. Labs are good, and you can do experiments with teachers. Classrooms are old. It has Buxar library with good books that we need.

individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good in this college.

content.Placements: Placements are average in this college. No top recruiting companies visit our college for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is spacious. Our college does not provide hostel facilities. Mess is not available. Library is also not available. Playground is available for sports like cricket, football, etc. NCC is also organised in this college.
content.Faculty: All the teachers are good. Semester-wise sessions are held late in this college. The pass percentage is average. This college is not aware of exams. The course will be completed as per schedule.

individual_reviews.title: Worts university in Bihar.

content.Placements: There are no placements at university and you get nothing. Exams are very late not good. No exam pattern is followed. You should not get admission in this university even in any university of Bihar. Bihar has the worst education in the world you should never do your graduation in Bihar.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel in the university you have to take the rent to do your graduation and fees of government colleges is between 4000-5000 and private colleges is between 20000-30000. And you do not have faculty members to teach your subject and you have to take coaching for your exam.
